title: YOUTH ALCOHOL AND DRUG OUTPATIENT TREATMENT - 211info
text: NORTHWEST FAMILY SERVICES YOUTH ALCOHOL AND DRUG OUTPATIENT TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Drug and alcohol outpatient treatment focusing on youth. 6200 SE King Road Portland, OR 97222 Eligibility: Ages 13-18 (in-school youth ages 12-20 for Multnomah County) Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 546-6377 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 546-6377 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP. Sliding scale fees and payment arrangements available. Free treatment slots available for those who qualify. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas County and Centennial and Reynolds School Districts SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Thursday 1pm-4pm Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - WOMEN'S HEALTH PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - CASA ESPERANZA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING INSIDE OUT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNSELING SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHWEST FAMILY SERVICES
